title: Black cart overlay
description: This pack is a lightweight pack that makes items smaller and has some cool and dark carts.
body:
This pack is a lightweight pack that makes items smaller and has some cool and dark carts.
We didnt change much to still make it feel vanilla but we did change some things that could make your gameplay way smoother.

join our discord server for updates and other packs: [Discord server](https://discord.gg/gXFnSNDBpK)
